kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": true, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "height": 720, "width": 1280 } }

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': True, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': {'height': 720, 'width': 1280}}

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://bridgerton.qacoders.dev.br/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive load in 30000.0
Load state load got in 30000
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Acessar at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'text=Acessar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Bem vindo(a) de volta! at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Cadastre-se já! at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'text=Cadastre-se já!'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Faça seu cadastro at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Build User
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${name} = João Fitness
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${email} = user_20260329192302@mailinator.com
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${password} = Abc@12345
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${question} = Qual sua cor favorita ?
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${answer} = Azul
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{user} = { name=João Fitness | email=user_20260329192302@mailinator.com | password=Abc@12345 | question=Qual sua cor favorita ? | answer=Azul }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: ${user} = {'name': 'João Fitness', 'email': 'user_20260329192302@mailinator.com', 'password': 'Abc@12345', 'question': 'Qual sua cor favorita ?', 'answer': 'Azul'}

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'João Fitness' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'user_20260329192302@mailinator.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Abc@12345' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Abc@12345' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) Qual sua cor favorita ? by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element css=#secretQuestion.
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Azul' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Cadastrar at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'text=Cadastrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 30000.0
Load state networkidle got in 30000
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.msg: ${USER} = {'name': 'João Fitness', 'email': 'user_20260329192302@mailinator.com', 'password': 'Abc@12345', 'question': 'Qual sua cor favorita ?', 'answer': 'Azul'}
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Build Anamnese
Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{anamnese} = { birthDate=1996-03-15 | height=175 | weight=77 | gender=Masculino }

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Build User
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${name} = João Fitness
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${email} = user_20260329192319@mailinator.com
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${password} = Abc@12345
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${question} = Qual sua cor favorita ?
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${answer} = Azul
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{user} = { name=João Fitness | email=user_20260329192319@mailinator.com | password=Abc@12345 | question=Qual sua cor favorita ? | answer=Azul }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: ${user} = {'name': 'João Fitness', 'email': 'user_20260329192319@mailinator.com', 'password': 'Abc@12345', 'question': 'Qual sua cor favorita ?', 'answer': 'Azul'}

kw.name: Fill Text

kw.msg: Fills the text 'Azul' in the given field.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.msg: ${USER} = {'name': 'João Fitness', 'email': 'user_20260329192319@mailinator.com', 'password': 'Abc@12345', 'question': 'Qual sua cor favorita ?', 'answer': 'Azul'}
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
